ham.subject: Flipkart Order Confirmation – #1234567890
ham.body:
Hello Priya,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! Your order #1234567890 has been confirmed. Here are the details:

• Item: Apple iPhone 14 Pro Max – ₹1,20,000
• Quantity: 1
• Shipping Address: 12, MG Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka
• Total Paid: ₹1,20,000 (incl. GST & delivery charges)

Your order is now being processed by our warehouse. You will receive a shipping confirmation email with the tracking number as soon as the package is dispatched.

If you have any questions or need to cancel your order, please reply to this email or contact our customer support at support@flipkart.com.

Thank you for choosing Flipkart! Happy shopping.

Best regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Microsoft 365 Password Expiry
spam.body:
Hello John,

This is an important notification from Microsoft Security. Your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in 3 days. To avoid any disruption to your services, please update your password immediately.

1. Click on the link below to verify your account:
   <URL>
2. Follow the on-screen instructions to set a new password.

If you do not update your password by the expiry date, your access to Microsoft 365 services (Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, etc.) will be suspended. For security reasons, we cannot provide the new password via email.

Please complete this action as soon as possible to keep your account safe.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
Microsoft Security Team
